name: Glow
description: A soft edge bloom. A multipass compositing layer: buffer0.frag and buffer1.frag apply a separable Gaussian blur (horizontal then vertical) to the input surface, and effect.frag screen-blends it as an inner glow plus an outer halo, following the input's own shape. Stack it after Border in a surface's chain to glow the rounded bordered window. Strength and tint are its parameters.
author: PlasmaZones

parameters.name: Glow tint
parameters.description: Colour the bloom is tinted toward
